data.name: Hentai World Coffee
data.detailed_description:
Step into a peaceful and magical puzzle experience where every cleared level reveals captivating artwork of lovely girls. Soft background music sets a soothing tone as you carefully slide and arrange tiles, uncovering each image little by little.

Enjoy the game at a relaxed pace with no time limits, and feel a satisfying sense of progression as puzzles gradually become more complex. Whether you play casually or love puzzle challenges, this game offers a perfect mix of relaxation, charm, and visual appeal.

Features:

Discover beautiful and eye-catching girl illustrations at every stage

Immerse yourself in calming background music

View completed artworks in full-screen display

Face progressively increasing puzzle difficulty

No timers or pressure—play freely and unwind

data.short_description: A soothing puzzle game with beautiful girl artwork, calming music, no time limits, and smooth difficulty progression for relaxing, stress-free gameplay.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 捷克文*, 丹麥文*, 荷蘭文*, 芬蘭文*, 日文*, 韓文*, 挪威文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*, 瑞典文*, 繁體中文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, or 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512MB
